exam_price_notes: $495 via PeopleCert or Pearson VUE. Open-book exam (TOGAF Standard v10 permitted).

testing_centers.notes: Online proctored and test center delivery for TOGAF and ArchiMate exams
Test center and online proctored delivery for select Open Group exams

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID with full name. Name must match registration exactly.
exam_rules: TOGAF Level 1 (Foundation) is closed-book. TOGAF Level 2 (Certified) and Combined Part 2 are open-book: the TOGAF Standard v10 document is permitted. No expiry on Open Group certifications. CBP (Certified Business Professional) pathway available for TOGAF.
renewal_options: Open Group certifications do not expire and do not require renewal.

retake_policy.notes: Retake policies are set by the delivery partner (PeopleCert or Pearson VUE). Check with the relevant provider.

official_study_resources.title: TOGAF Standard, 10th Edition
official_study_resources.notes: The primary reference document; permitted in Level 2 / Combined Part 2 exams

official_study_resources.title: Open Group Certification Study Guides
official_study_resources.notes: Official exam preparation materials available on the certification page
